creator: githubaman@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 250359
Shows acpi errors that take over the terminal often (even during installation)

CPUs spin like crazy on aarch64 FreeBSD 14.0-RELEASE install on Parallels Apple Silicon. Adding debug.acpi.disabled="ged" to /boot/loader.conf resolves the problem. The solution was suggested by u/MikeKarels on reddit. The link to the post on reddit that led to this bug report being filed is available below:
 https://www.reddit.com/r/freebsd/comments/1ciuj7e/cpus_spinning_like_crazy_after_fresh_ufs_or_zfs/?utm_source=share&utm_medium=web3x&utm_name=web3xcss&utm_term=1&utm_content=share_button
